title: Highlights from Ilya Sutskever’s November 2025 interview with Dwarkesh Patel — EA Forum
excerpts:
Section Title: Effective Altruism Forum > Background
Content:
[Ilya Sutskever](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ilya_Sutskever) is a renowned machine learning researcher who co-authored the [AlexNet](https://computerhistory.org/blog/chm-releases-alexnet-source-code/) paper in 2012 that helped kick off the [deep learning revolution](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Deep_learning) . Sutskever co-founded OpenAI and served as Chief Scientist until 2024. He participated in the temporary ouster of CEO Sam Altman and subsequently left the company. Following his departure, he founded his own company, [Safe Superintelligence](https://www.reuters.com/technology/artificial-intelligence/openai-co-founder-sutskevers-new-safety-focused-ai-startup-ssi-raises-1-billion-2024-09-04/) , which has [raised](https://www.crunchbase.com/discover/funding_rounds/field/organizations/funding_total/safe-superintelligence) $3 billion, but about which little else is known.

title: I'm planning to read Ilya Sutskever's 30 - Rami Luisto
excerpts:
Section Title: I'm planning to read Ilya Sutskever's 30
Content:
The list, copied from [here](https://gist.github.com/matijagrcic/ae8353eb1e6be84a7c85d9fdc2f9631f) , is listed below. Some of these are blog posts, other scientific articles and others are full text books. The list seemed cool at first glance so I'm planning to start reading it through in no particular order. In future separate posts I'll also try to post a few thoughts about each one, or groups of them, but this post will function as my main diary of my progress of reading the list through.

title: Sutskever's New Company, SSI, Bets on Google Cloud TPUs ...

Section Title: Sutskever's New Company, SSI, Bets on Google Cloud TPUs to Accelerate Safe Superintelligent AI De...
Content:
Published in Latest AI News
Time : Apr 10, 2025
Read : 4 minute
Safe Superintelligence (SSI), a new AI startup founded by Ilya Sutskever, co-founder and former chief scientist of OpenAI, has announced a partnership with Google Cloud. According to a press release issued on Wednesday, SSI will leverage Google Cloud's TPU chips to accelerate the development of its "safe superintelligence AI." Google Cloud revealed that SSI is using its TPUs to boost R&D speed in building safe superintelligent AI.

Ilya Sutskever, a brilliant mind behind the most groundbreaking advancements in artificial intelligence, has embarked on perhaps his most ambitious journey yet. After leaving OpenAI in a dramatic split from his co-founder Sam Altman, Sutskever has launched *Safe Superintelligence Inc* . (SSI), a company with a singular focus: creating superintelligent AI that will not pose an existential threat to humanity. title: 13 Fastest Growing Generative AI Platforms Companies and Startups | Landbase
excerpts:
Section Title: 13 Fastest Growing Generative AI Platforms Companies and Startups > ... > **What They Do:**
Content:
Safe Superintelligence (SSI), co-founded by former OpenAI Chief Scientist Ilya Sutskever, focuses exclusively on building "safe superintelligence" as its core mission. Unlike companies optimizing for revenue or features, SSI prioritizes AI alignment and safety as fundamental requirements. The company represents the growing AI safety movement gaining regulatory and investor attention.
